'''Myrat'ur''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] flying with [[Byalfin Dyur]] and the ''[[Boneyard Rendezvous]]'' as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Dyur was going to order him to go down to the surface of [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]] in one of the freighter's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Ben Skywalker]], after fellow pilot [[Keldan]] had failed. However, it was in fact the [[Chev]] [[Ovvit]], another ''Boneyard'' pirate, who encountered Skywalker, subsequently killed as the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Telekinesis/Legends|brought]] tons of rocks crashing down on his craft. Myrat'ur most likely died when the ''Boneyard'' was attacked and possibly destroyed by Skywalker in the [[Sith Meditation Sphere]] he had used to escape the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1stm}}
